global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with promotional text and a call to action for a food delivery service.
global.main_message: Promoting fast food delivery with a special offer.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, creating a vibrant and attention-grabbing base.

elements.label: Food delivery app screenshot
elements.description: A simple outline of a smartphone displaying a blank screen, representing a food delivery app interface.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15' is centrally positioned, emphasizing the offer.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Free delivery over $15

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: The logo 'FreshDash' is displayed in a prominent font at the top left, colored in white against the red background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Book now' in white, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold black text, positioned at the top right corner.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small circular tag labeled 'UGC' in white text on a black background, located at the top left.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bold and colorful, promotional text, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the promotional text is centered, and the call to action button is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Fast food, fast, Free delivery over $15, FreshDash, Book now, SALE, UGC
